title: Zara's Big Feelings Day
synopsis: Join Zara as she experiences big emotions throughout her day - from anger when her tower falls down, to sadness when Mama leaves, to happiness when they reunite. A gentle story about feelings and family love.

pages.text: Zara was building the tallest tower ever! Block by block, up up up it went. She was so proud of her colorful creation.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes building a tall block tower in a bright playroom, surrounded by warm golden light indicating joy and concentration
illustration.alt: Zara building a tall tower with blocks

pages.text: CRASH! The tower fell down! All the blocks scattered everywhere. Zara felt something hot and swirly inside her tummy.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes looking upset as blocks fall around her, with angry red swirls and jagged shapes filling the background to show her mad feelings
illustration.alt: Zara looking angry as her block tower crashes down

pages.text: "I'm MAD!" Zara shouted. She stomped her feet. The red angry feeling filled her whole body. Mama came over with gentle arms.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes stomping her feet with her mother approaching, intense red swirls and storm clouds representing anger emotions swirling around them
illustration.alt: Zara stomping angrily while Mama approaches to comfort her

pages.text: "It's okay to feel mad," Mama said softly. "Let's take deep breaths together." They breathed in and out. The red swirls got smaller and smaller.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes breathing deeply with her mother, the angry red swirls in the background gradually fading to calmer pink and orange tones
illustration.alt: Zara and Mama breathing together as the angry feelings calm down

pages.text: After breakfast, Mama put on her coat. "I have to go to work now, little love," she said. "Grandma will take care of you."

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes watching her mother put on a coat, with soft blue undertones beginning to appear in the background like gathering clouds
illustration.alt: Zara watching Mama get ready to leave for work

pages.text: Zara's eyes got watery. Her bottom lip wobbled. "Don't go, Mama!" she cried. Blue sadness rained down all around her.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes with tears in her eyes, surrounded by sad blue rain drops and gray-blue storm clouds representing her sadness
illustration.alt: Zara crying with tears and sad blue rain all around her

pages.text: Grandma hugged Zara tight. "Sad feelings are okay too," she whispered. "Mama always comes back. Let's look at photos of happy times together."

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes being hugged by her grandmother, with the sad blue rain slowly clearing as warm purple and pink comfort colors begin to appear
illustration.alt: Grandma hugging Zara as the sad feelings start to ease

pages.text: When Mama came home, Zara's face lit up like sunshine! "Mama!" she squealed, running into her arms for the biggest hug ever.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes running toward her mother with arms wide open, surrounded by brilliant happy yellow sunshine rays and golden sparkles of joy
illustration.alt: Zara running happily to hug Mama who has returned home

pages.text: "I had big feelings today," Zara told Mama. "Mad red feelings and sad blue feelings. But now I have happy yellow feelings!"

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes talking animatedly to her mother, with a background showing the journey of emotions - red swirls, blue rain, and yellow sunshine all blending together
illustration.alt: Zara explaining her day of different emotions to Mama

pages.text: Mama smiled and kissed Zara's forehead. "All feelings are okay, my brave girl. I love you no matter what colors your feelings are." Zara felt warm and safe, surrounded by love.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes being kissed on the forehead by her mother, enveloped in warm rainbow colors representing love and acceptance, with gentle sparkles of contentment
illustration.alt: Mama kissing Zara's forehead with loving rainbow emotions surrounding them

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color were Zara's angry feelings?
questions.explanation: Zara's angry feelings were red, like hot swirls in her tummy when her tower fell down.

questions.question: Why did Zara feel sad blue feelings?
questions.explanation: Zara felt sad blue feelings like rain when Mama had to leave for work.

questions.question: Who helped Zara when she felt mad?
questions.explanation: Mama helped Zara breathe deeply when she felt mad about her tower falling down.

questions.question: What did Mama tell Zara about feelings?
questions.explanation: Mama told Zara that all feelings are okay and she loves her no matter what colors her feelings are.
